plan.action: Verify lib/merge.sh is complete: merge_check_clean_tree, merge_check_main_exists, merge_check_no_conflicts, merge_safe_check are all implemented and source-clean.
Verify lib/loop.sh integrates merge_safe_check in loop_run_iteration after commit_create and before deploy_gate, handling rc=2 (conflict) by routing to rework_loop and rc!=0 as hard failure.
Verify clippy.sh sources lib/merge.sh so merge_safe_check is available at runtime.

Verify tests/merge.bats covers all acceptance criteria: clean tree check, main-exists check, conflict detection, artifact creation (merge_check.json with all_passed), logging, and correct return codes (0/1/2).
Run shellcheck on lib/merge.sh to confirm typecheck passes (no warnings/errors).
Run bats tests/merge.bats to confirm all 31 tests pass.
Mark US-014 passes=true in the PRD.

testing_recommendations: All 31 tests in tests/merge.bats already pass — verify with: bats tests/merge.bats
Confirm merge_check_clean_tree returns 0 for clean tree, 1 for staged/modified tracked files
Confirm merge_check_main_exists returns 0 when main exists, 1 when absent
Confirm merge_safe_check writes Output/<ticket_id>/merge_check.json with checks and all_passed fields
Confirm merge_safe_check returns 2 on conflict (triggering rework path in loop.sh)
Confirm merge_safe_check does not modify the working tree (uses merge-tree dry-run)
Run full test suite (bats tests/) to confirm no regressions in loop or other modules
